nonBlockingIssues.description: Phase comparison 'insufficient_data' flag uses AND logic (both phases must have 0 scored) rather than per-phase OR logic. UI compensates by showing per-metric-cell 'insufficient data' labels.
Parameter sweep navigation uses dropdown selector instead of direct click-on-chart navigation due to Plotly go.Parcoords not supporting clickData callbacks.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Plotly go.Parcoords clickData limitation to architecture.md under 'Plotly Limitations' section

rejectedObservations.observation: Parameter dimension counts differ from spec estimates (26 old-era vs ~10 spec, 16 LME vs ~15 spec)
rejectedObservations.reason: Data observation, not a reusable convention. Dimension selection is correctly data-driven via coverage thresholds.

rejectedObservations.observation: exp_lme_0056 edge case (validation_failed with CV data) handling pattern
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in library/environment.md under Known Edge Cases.

rejectedObservations.observation: Snapshot viewer stepping TICK_STEP constant of 20 and animation loop-back behavior
rejectedObservations.reason: Implementation detail, not a reusable pattern or convention that other workers need.
